description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 21, 2025 at 10:33 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a passenger car on San Bruno Avenue near Arleta Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southwestbound on San Bruno Avenue when it slowed to a stop to yield to a passenger car stopped in-lane. 
While the Waymo AV was stopped, the passenger car reversed and the rear of the passenger car made contact with the front of the Waymo 
AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode, and a test driver was present (in the 
driver’s seating position). Both vehicles sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
